name: type: bug
description: Something is not working as expected.

name: type: feature
description: A request for new or expanded behavior.

name: type: docs
description: Documentation changes or gaps.

name: type: question
description: A question that needs maintainer response.

name: area: epub-import
description: EPUB import, parsing, or metadata.

name: area: translation
description: Translator providers, prompts, glossary, or style.

name: area: export
description: Translated EPUB writing and export history.

name: area: validation
description: Internal validation or external EPUBCheck.

name: area: job-manager
description: Resume, retry, cache, and job state.

name: area: packaging
description: Electron Builder packages and release artifacts.

name: area: ci
description: Continuous integration and release checks.

name: area: privacy
description: Local-first privacy, diagnostics, or sensitive data handling.

name: compat: epub2
description: EPUB 2 compatibility.

name: compat: epub3
description: EPUB 3 compatibility.

name: compat: images
description: Image and resource compatibility.

name: compat: footnotes
description: Footnotes, anchors, links, and inline markup.

name: compat: cjk
description: CJK source text or output handling.

name: compat: fixed-layout
description: Fixed-layout EPUB reports, currently out of scope.

name: priority: p0
description: Release-blocking or data-loss issue.

name: priority: p1
description: High priority alpha issue.

name: priority: p2
description: Normal priority alpha issue.

name: status: needs-repro
description: Needs a minimal reproduction or fixture.

name: status: needs-info
description: Needs more information from the reporter.

name: status: confirmed
description: Confirmed by maintainers.

name: status: wontfix
description: Intentionally not planned.

name: good first issue
description: Good candidate for a first contribution.
